summary.intent: Add Jenkins job URL to the MR description in release_from_fbc.py, following the same pattern used in prepare_release_konflux.py.
summary.outcome: Successfully added job_url field initialization, BUILD_URL environment variable reading in check_env_vars(), and updated MR description to prepend 'Created by job: {url}' when available.

repo: The codebase has a consistent pattern across pipelines for including Jenkins job URLs in GitLab MR descriptions
BUILD_URL environment variable is used to track the Jenkins job that triggered the pipeline

code.finding: job_url is initialized to None in __init__
job_url is populated from BUILD_URL environment variable in check_env_vars()
MR description pattern uses 'Created by job: {url}\n\n' prefix when job_url exists, otherwise falls back to commit_message
create_shipment_mr() method handles MR creation with branch naming pattern 'prepare-shipment-{assembly}-{timestamp}' and remove_source_branch set to True

workflow: When adding Jenkins job tracking to MRs: (1) initialize attribute in __init__, (2) read BUILD_URL in check_env_vars(), (3) conditionally prepend to MR description
